coveredConstructs.notes: Field identity candidates normalize into OFARM structure assertions and supporting evidence first.
Zone semantics require OFARM identity and lifecycle policy before promotion.

coveredConstructs.ofarmTargetRef: operation claim plus execution evidence linkage

droppedConstructs.notes: Retained in the raw payload as evidence but not normalized into active semantics by default.

approximatedConstructs.notes: Some attachment semantics collapse into a smaller governed equipment relation model.

notes: ADAPT ingest is normalized as governed import evidence and claims rather than accepted truth by format presence alone.
